creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-06-05 22:07:10 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    textproc             Makefile 
  Added files:
    textproc/p5-LaTeX-Driver Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  The LaTeX::Driver module encapsulates the details of invoking the
  Latex programs to format a LaTeX document. Formatting with LaTeX
  is complicated; there are potentially many programs to run and the
  output of those programs must be monitored to determine whether
  further processing is required.
  
  WWW:    http://search.cpan.org/dist/LaTeX-Driver/
  
  PR:             ports/135170
  Submitted by:   Wen Heping <wenheping at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1345    +1 -0      ports/textproc/Makefile
  1.1       +37 -0     ports/textproc/p5-LaTeX-Driver/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/textproc/p5-LaTeX-Driver/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/textproc/p5-LaTeX-Driver/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +10 -0     ports/textproc/p5-LaTeX-Driver/pkg-plist (new)
